attributes.action: Request a vote of no confidence in the Labour Party and elect a new government
attributes.additional_details: This country stands dangerously close to losing what it means to be progressive, safe, and thriving. The current governing party has shown repeated ineffectiveness in addressing crucial issues that matter to us, the citizens. I am gravely concerned that if this situation persists, our beloved country is at risk of declining into a third-world status. We cannot afford to passively stand by as the governing body remains oblivious to our needs.
attributes.background: Keir Starmer and the Labour Government have gone too far and are not acting in the best interests or wants of the Great British public. We want the Prime Minister to call for an immediate general election by calling a dissolution of Parliament from the Sovereign.

rejection.details:
We can't accept petitions about appointments, which includes calling for a vote of no confidence in the Government. This is set out in the Committee's standards: https://petition.parliament.uk/help

You may wish to sign the following:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
